objectType.title: Object Type
objectType.description: The category of record to look up. Set to 'Doctor' when searching for a doctor by name. Set to 'Facility' when searching for a hospital, clinic, or other place of service by name. Set to 'OpenTasks' to find existing open Tasks linked to a doctor's Account.

searchId.title: Search Id
searchId.description: Used for OpenTasks lookups only. Pass the resolved doctor's Account Id (the recordId from a prior Doctor lookup in this same conversation). Leave blank for Doctor and Facility lookups.

searchName.title: Search Name
searchName.description: Used for Doctor and Facility lookups only. Pass the raw name as the user said it — partial and salutation-tolerant matching is handled internally (e.g. "Dr. Patel" matches "Vikram Patel"). Leave blank for OpenTasks lookups.
